title: Scavenger
description: A mod for interesting item speedruns with additional modifiers.
body:
![Scavenger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5482063ba7df95239fd747c74799b3538acb178.png)

This mod allows for _exciting_ **item speedruns** in Minecraft!

## What's an item speedrun?
![The timer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ad01e8cddc7545b81a5a1add5cb86fa63269c4c.png)

Whenever you begin to create your world - you are presented with a couple of wheels you can spin, to determine your goal. Once you create the world - the timer will start and your goal is to find that item, while following the additional modifier that you got!

![Wheel animation](https://github.com/catboybinary/scavenger/blob/master/images/wheels.webp?raw=true)

## Configuration
You can find the config file at `config/scavenger.yaml`

Full up-to-date list of modifiers can be found in the [lang file here](https://github.com/catboybinary/scavenger/blob/master/common/src/main/resources/assets/scavenger/lang/en_us.json), or down here

<details>
<summary>Modifiers</summary>

- scavenger:none
- scavenger:giant
- scavenger:tiny
- scavenger:twice
- scavenger:thrice
- scavenger:turtle
- scavenger:sonic
- scavenger:vegetarian
- scavenger:carnivore
- scavenger:speed_up
- scavenger:mole
- scavenger:drunk
- scavenger:asocial
- scavenger:main_character
- scavenger:npc
- scavenger:snail
- scavenger:holey_pockets
- scavenger:one_arm
- scavenger:brittle_bones
- scavenger:hydrophobic
- scavenger:silence
- scavenger:insomnia
- scavenger:uneducated
- scavenger:dejavu
- scavenger:large_biomes
- scavenger:amplified
- scavenger:noir
- scavenger:eclipse
- scavenger:solstice
- scavenger:tourist
- scavenger:fearful
- scavenger:shuffled_chests
- scavenger:finalist
- scavenger:alien

</details>

## And off you go!
The mod is highly configurable, and moderately extensible. It is possible to create simple addons that add new modifiers (although that feature is not fully tested and may be subject to change :P)
